Issue.issue_title:
Blueberry forex https://blueberrymarkets.com/ar/

Blueberry is an online trading platform and forex/CFD broker that allows users to trade currencies, commodities, indices, and crypto‑based instruments through fast‑execution, low‑spread accounts and professional tools like MetaTrader 4/5 and TradingView. [1][3][5]

### What Blueberry is
- Blueberry (often branded as Blueberry Markets) is a regulated forex and CFD broker founded in Australia, offering trading on 2,000+ instruments across multiple asset classes. [1][3][5]
- It focuses on transparent pricing, tight spreads, and fast order execution, targeting both beginner and experienced traders. [1][3][5]

### Main features
- Supports popular platforms such as MT4, MT5, TradingView, and a web/mobile app with a user‑friendly interface. [1][2][6]
- Provides different account types (Standard and ECN/Professional), competitive leverage, and tools for analysis and automated trading. [3][5][9]
